Name: MenuParam
Description: Determines the configuration of various parameters relating to the interface.

Fields.Name: Death Message: Fade Out Delay (Singleplayer)
Fields.Description: The duration that the 'YOU DIED' is displayed before fading out if in singleplayer.

Fields.Name: Death Message: Fade Out Delay (Multiplayer)
Fields.Description: The duration that the 'YOU DIED' is displayed before fading out if a client in a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Max Displayed Player AP
Fields.Description: The value with which to calculate what percentage of the length of the gauge prepared by resources is used when displaying the AP gauge.

Fields.Name: Max Diplayed Player FP
Fields.Description: The value with which to calculate what percentage of the length of the gauge prepared by the resource is used when displaying the FP gauge.

Fields.Name: Max Displayed Player Energy
Fields.Description: The value with which to calculate what percentage of the length of the gauge prepared by the resource is used when displaying the Energy gauge.

Fields.Name: Action Panel Change Threshold: Player Velocity
Fields.Description: The action panel switchable player speed. Switching is possible when below this speed.

Fields.Name: Action Panel Change Threshold: Pass Time
Fields.Description: The consideration time for speeding up players who can switch action panels. Use the average speed during this time (maximum 4 seconds according to the system).

Fields.Name: Max Addition to Player AP
Fields.Description: The maximum value to be added to the player's maximum AP when calculating what percentage of the gauge length affected by the addition is used.

Fields.Name: Max Addition to Player FP
Fields.Description: The maximum value to be added to the player's maximum FP when calculating what percentage of the gauge length affected by the addition is used.

Fields.Name: Max Addition to Player Energy
Fields.Description: The maximum value to be added to the player's maximum Energy when calculating what percentage of the gauge length affected by the addition is used.

Fields.Name: Decal Display: Horizontal Offset
Fields.Description: The horizontal offset to apply to decal display position.

Fields.Name: Decal Display: Vertical Offset
Fields.Description: The vertical offset to apply to decal display position.

Fields.Name: Search Icon: Display Duration
Fields.Description: The time that the Search icon to be displayed on the HUD. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Battle Icon: Display Duration
Fields.Description: The time that the Battle icon to be displayed on the HUD. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Impact Gauge: Fade Delay
Fields.Description: The time that the Impact gauge is displayed for on the HUD before fading out. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Marker: Rendering Width
Fields.Description: The width of the rendering range that a marker can be drawn in.

Fields.Name: Marker: Rendering Height
Fields.Description: The height of the rendering range that a marker can be drawn in.

Fields.Name: AP Gauge: Fade Delay
Fields.Description: The time that the AP gauge is displayed on the HUD before fading out. In seconds.

Fields.Name: AP Gauge: Fade Delay (Dead)
Fields.Description: The time that the AP gauge is displayed on the HUD before fading out, when the player is killed. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Hit Marker: Display Duration
Fields.Description: The duration to a hit marker is displayed on the HUD for. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Hacking Gauge: Fade Delay
Fields.Description: The time that the Hacking gauge is displayed on the HUD before fading out. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Impact Gauge: Update Duration
Fields.Description: The time before the Impact gauge is updated to its new state after a hit. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Minimap: World Display Range
Fields.Description: The display range for the world in the minimap. In metres.

Fields.Name: Minimap: Radar Range
Fields.Description: The range of the radar effect in the minimap. In metres

Fields.Name: Stagger Break Indicator Threshold
Fields.Description: The threshold (ratio) of Stagger value that produces indicator that enemy is vulnerable to Stagger Break.

Fields.Name: Locked Camera: Interpolation Coefficient
Fields.Description: The coefficient used to supplement lock-on movement when camera is fixed.

Fields.Name: Locked Camera: Release Interpolation Coefficient
Fields.Description: The coefficient used to supplement lock-on movement when a fixed camera is released.

Fields.Name: Search Icon: Fade Out Delay
Fields.Description: The duration before the enemy search indicator icon starts facing out. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Locked Camera: Release Interpolation Distance
Fields.Description: The distance between the lock-on and the target position after which the lock-on will be interpolated.

Fields.Name: Soul Acquisition Animation Delay
Fields.Description: The duration before the soul acquisition animation occurs after recieving souls. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Danger Icon: Display Time
Fields.Description: The time that the Danger icon to be displayed on the HUD. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Terms of Use: Scroll Speed (Normal)
Fields.Description: The speed of scrolling through the terms of use. In pixels.

Fields.Name: Terms of Use: Scroll Speed (Fast)
Fields.Description: The speed of scrolling through the terms of use. In pixels.

Fields.Name: Terms of Use: Scroll Speed (Mouse)
Fields.Description: The speed of scrolling through the terms of use. In pixels.

Fields.Name: Terms of Use: Number of Fast Scrolls
Fields.Description: The number of allowable fast scrolls.

Fields.Name: Prologue Delay
Fields.Description: The duration before the prologue movie plays. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Credit Roll Duration
Fields.Description: The duration the staff credit roll plays for. In seconds.

Fields.Name: 3D Minimap: Player Icon Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the player icon when displayed on the 3D minimap.

Fields.Name: 3D Minimap: Target Spotted Icon Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the target spotted icon when displayed on the 3D minimap.

Fields.Name: 3D Minimap: Enemy Icon Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the enemy icon when displayed on the 3D minimap.

Fields.Name: 3D Minimap: Radar Icon Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the radar icon when displayed on the 3D minimap.

Fields.Name: 3D Minimap: Operational Area Height Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value for the height of the operational area when displayed on the 3D minimap.

Fields.Name: 3D Minimap: Supply Point Icon Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the supply point icon when displayed on the 3D minimap.

Fields.Name: 3D Minimap: Catapult Icon Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the catapult point icon when displayed on the 3D minimap.

Fields.Name: 3D Minimap: Route Icon Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the route icon when displayed on the 3D minimap.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Boundary: Fade-in Duration
Fields.Description: The fade-in time for the mission area boundary interface element to appear. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Boundary: Particle ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use for the mission region boundary.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Boundary: Start Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which the mission area boundary lines will start to appear. In metres.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Boundary: Color Shift Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which the color of the mission area boundary shifts. In metres.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Boundary: Height
Fields.Description: The vertical width of the mission area boundary line. In metres.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Boundary: Tiling Scale
Fields.Description: The tiling scale for the boundary line texture.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Boundary: Height Offset
Fields.Description: The height offset to apply to the boundary line.

Fields.Name: Minimap: Repair Point Transparency - Start Height
Fields.Description: The start height for applying the fade transparency to the repair point icon (on the minimap). Distance is compared to the player's position. In metres.

Fields.Name: Minimap: Repair Point Transparency - End Height
Fields.Description: The end height for applying the fade transparency to the repair point icon (on the minimap). Distance is compared to the player's position. In metres.

Fields.Name: Minimap: Repair Point Transparency - Minimum Alpha
Fields.Description: The minimum alpha value to use for transparency when fading the repair point icon (on the minimap).

Fields.Name: Mission Area Boundary: Use Additive Blending
Fields.Description: If ON, draw the boundary lines in the mission area with additive blending.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Boundary: Use Particles
Fields.Description: If ON, the boundary lines will be expressed using particles (SFX).

Fields.Name: Minimap: Change Interval
Fields.Description: The interval at which the minimap display changes when the map is switched. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Reticule Offset for Dual Pistols
Fields.Description: The distance to shift the lock-on reticule from the centre position when using two pistols.

Fields.Name: 3D Minimap: Tower Icon Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the tower icon when displayed on the 3D minimap.

Fields.Name: 3D Minimap: City Icon Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the city icon when displayed on the 3D minimap.

Fields.Name: 3D Minimap: Fortified City Icon Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the fortified city icon when displayed on the 3D minimap.

Fields.Name: 3D Minimap: Colony Ship Icon Scale
Fields.Description: The scale value of the colony ship icon when displayed on the 3D minimap.

Fields.Name: View Mode: Model Movable Range (X)
Fields.Description: The model movable range (on the x-axis) in view mode.

Fields.Name: View Mode: Model Movable Range (Y)
Fields.Description: The model movable range (on the y-axis) in view mode.

Fields.Name: Lock Reticule Transparency
Fields.Description: The alpha value of the lock cursor when shooting is disabled.

Fields.Name: Item Acquisition Log: Item Display Duration
Fields.Description: The time it takes to add one line to the item acquistion log and then fade it out. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Assembly Menu: Rotation Input Time Threshold
Fields.Description: When in the assembly menu, the duration to check for to determine if there has been no pad input for model rotation. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Garage Helicopter Call: SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The SpEffect ID that is applied when selecting the garage helicopter call.

Fields.Name: Low HP Threshold % for HUD Effects
Fields.Description: The threshold value used to determine that the remaining HP ratio is low.

Fields.Name: Low Shield Threshold % for HUD Effects
Fields.Description: The threshold value used to determine that the remaining shield ratio is low.

Fields.Name: HP Threshold % for Large Damage HUD Effect
Fields.Description: The threshold value used to determine that a large damage event has occured.

Fields.Name: Large Damage Detection Time
Fields.Description: The duration over which damage can be suffered for it to be counted as a 'large damage' event. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Garage: Camera Animation Delay when Focused
Fields.Description: The delay before the camera animation starts when focusing on an item in the garage. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Garage: Fade Effect Time
Fields.Description: The duration of the fading that occurs in conjuction with the garage camera animation.

Fields.Name: Strategy Line: Display Width
Fields.Description: The display width to use for the strategy line. In metres.

Fields.Name: Strategy Line: Fade Out Time
Fields.Description: The fade out duration when leaving the strategy line location. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Warning Line: Display Start Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which the warning line is displayed. In metres.

Fields.Name: Warning Line: Color Shift Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which the color of the warning line shifts. In metres.

Fields.Name: Garage: Pad Input Detection Delay
Fields.Description: The delay from playing the camera animation to accepting new camera pad input. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Garage: Head Assembly Change - Animation ID
Fields.Description: The animation that plays after changing a head part in the assembly menu.

Fields.Name: Garage: Core Assembly Change - Animation ID
Fields.Description: The animation that plays after changing a core part in the assembly menu.

Fields.Name: Garage: Arm Assembly Change - Animation ID
Fields.Description: The animation that plays after changing an arm part in the assembly menu.

Fields.Name: Garage: Leg Assembly Change - Animation ID
Fields.Description: The animation that plays after changing a leg part in the assembly menu.

Fields.Name: Garage: Assembly Change - Animation ID
Fields.Description: The animation that plays after changing a part in the assembly menu.

Fields.Name: Garage: Vertical Camera Movement Speed
Fields.Description: The vertical movement speed of the camera when in the garage. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Garage: Horizontal Camera Movement Speed
Fields.Description: The horizontal movement speed of the camera when in the garage. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Boundary: Vertical Display Offset
Fields.Description: The vertical display offset of lines above and below the mission area line.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Edge: Particle Hide Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which the mission area edge SFX is hidden. In metres.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Edge: Particle Fade Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which the mission area edge SFX fades at. The start fade distance is the sum of this distance and the hide distance. In metres.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Edge: Texture Width
Fields.Description: The display width of the mission area edge texture. In metres.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Edge: Texture Height
Fields.Description: The display height of the mission area edge texture. In metres.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Edge: Horizontal Texture Offset
Fields.Description: The texture position offset (on the x-axis) for the mission area edge texture. In metres.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Edge: Vertical Texture Offset
Fields.Description: The texture position offset (on the y-axis) for the mission area edge texture. In metres.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Line: Maximum Height
Fields.Description: The maximum height to use for the mission area boundary line when hitting the map ceiling. In metres.

Fields.Name: Mission Area Line: Minimum Height
Fields.Description: The minimum height to use for the mission area boundary line when hitting the map floor. In metres.

Fields.Name: Briefing: Blur Duration
Fields.Description: The time it takes for the briefing background blur to reach its completely blurred state. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Briefing: Camera Animation Blur Delay
Fields.Description: The delay before the blurring starts if the camera is playing an animation (during a briefing).

Fields.Name: Briefing: Blur %
Fields.Description: The blur rate to use for the briefing background blur.

Fields.Name: Weak Coral Effect: Scroll Speed
Fields.Description: The texture scroll speed for the weak coral HUD effect.

Fields.Name: Weak Coral Effect: Display Width
Fields.Description: The standard width of the horizontal texture display width for the weak coral HUD effect.

Fields.Name: Weak Coral Effect: Fade In Duration
Fields.Description: The fade in duration for the weak coral HUD effect. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Weak Coral Effect: R
Fields.Description: The red component of the RGBA color used by the weak coral HUD effect.

Fields.Name: Weak Coral Effect: G
Fields.Description: The green component of the RGBA color used by the weak coral HUD effect.

Fields.Name: Weak Coral Effect: B
Fields.Description: The blue component of the RGBA color used by the weak coral HUD effect.

Fields.Name: Weak Coral Effect: Alpha
Fields.Description: The alpha component of the RGBA color used by the weak coral HUD effect.

Fields.Name: Strong Coral Effect: Scroll Speed
Fields.Description: The texture scroll speed for the strong coral HUD effect.

Fields.Name: Strong Coral Effect: Display Width
Fields.Description: The standard width of the horizontal texture display width for the strong coral HUD effect.

Fields.Name: Strong Coral Effect: Fade In Duration
Fields.Description: The fade in duration for the strong coral HUD effect. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Strong Coral Effect: R
Fields.Description: The red component of the RGBA color used by the strong coral HUD effect.

Fields.Name: Strong Coral Effect: G
Fields.Description: The green component of the RGBA color used by the strong coral HUD effect.

Fields.Name: Strong Coral Effect: B
Fields.Description: The blue component of the RGBA color used by the strong coral HUD effect.

Fields.Name: Strong Coral Effect: Alpha
Fields.Description: The alpha component of the RGBA color used by the strong coral HUD effect.

Fields.Name: Comparison: Floating Display Range
Fields.Description: The floating display range to use for comparison.

Fields.Name: Damage Display Duration
Fields.Description: The cumulative time for damage display. In seconds.
